content.finding: Adaptive eta (Exp B) and heterogeneous eta (Control A) both improve generalization without improving training performance
content.evidence: Control A: hetero +0.042 on novel. Exp B: adaptive +0.041 on novel. Both ~tied on training
implications: Training/generalization split may be architectural property
Stage 3 exit criterion ambiguity: does generalization advantage count as 'beats fixed'?
